query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.corretorId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_corretor,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.role = 'admin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_gestor,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.role = 'corretor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_corretor,
  COUNT(l.id) as total
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id
LIMIT 1;

SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN u.role = 'admin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_gestor,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.role = 'corretor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_corretor,
  COUNT(l.id) as total
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id
